widgets.title: Budget vs Spend Correlation
widgets.description: Scatter plot showing the correlation between campaign budget and actual spend.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "campaign_name" AS col1, CAST("budget" AS DOUBLE) AS x, "spend" AS y FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" WHERE "budget" IS NOT NULL AND "spend" IS NOT NULL LIMIT 1000

widgets.title: Budget by Campaign Name
widgets.description: Total budget allocated for each campaign, grouped by campaign name.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "campaign_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("budget") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY "campaign_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Budget Over Start Date
widgets.description: Trend of total budget allocated over time by start date month.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "start_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, CAST(SUM("budget") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY date_trunc('month', "start_date") ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Spend by Campaign Name Over Start Date
widgets.description: Trend of total spend for each campaign name aggregated by month of start date.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "start_date") AS VARCHAR) AS "x", "campaign_name" AS "series", CAST(SUM("spend") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY "x", "series" ORDER BY "x" ASC, "series" ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Campaign Name × Channel Heatmap
widgets.description: Heatmap showing total spend by campaign name and channel.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "campaign_name" AS row, "channel" AS col, CAST(SUM("spend") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY "campaign_name", "channel" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 400

widgets.title: Total Budget
widgets.description: Sum of all campaign budgets across all time.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT 'Total Budget' AS label, CAST(SUM("budget") AS DOUBLE) AS value, 0.0 AS delta, 'positive' AS sentiment, 'overall' AS delta_basis FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" LIMIT 1

widgets.title: Campaign Name Composition by Channel
widgets.description: Stacked bar chart showing total spend per campaign name broken down by channel.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "campaign_name" AS label, "channel_label" AS "group", CAST(SUM("spend") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY label, "group" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Budget Distribution by Channel
widgets.description: Shows the proportion of total budget allocated to each marketing channel.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "channel_label" AS label, CAST(SUM("budget") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY "channel_label" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 10

widgets.title: Budget vs Spend by Campaign Name
widgets.description: Compare the allocated budget against actual spend for each marketing campaign.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "campaign_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("budget") AS DOUBLE) AS value1, CAST(SUM("spend") AS DOUBLE) AS value2 FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY "campaign_name" ORDER BY (value1 + value2) DESC LIMIT 20

widgets.title: Spend Volume Over Start Date
widgets.description: Total spend aggregated by month of campaign start date
widgets.dataKey: SELECT CAST(date_trunc('month', "start_date") AS VARCHAR) AS x, CAST(SUM("spend") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY date_trunc('month', "start_date") ORDER BY x ASC LIMIT 500

widgets.title: Campaign Name Ranked by Spend
widgets.description: Top 25 campaigns ranked by total spend amount
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "campaign_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("spend") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY "campaign_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 25

widgets.title: Impressions Proportion by Campaign Name
widgets.description: Shows the relative number of impressions for each campaign name as a treemap.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT "campaign_name" AS label, CAST(SUM("impressions") AS DOUBLE) AS value FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY "campaign_name" ORDER BY value DESC LIMIT 30

widgets.title: Campaign Name Composition Over Start Date
widgets.description: Stacked area chart showing total spend composition by campaign name over months based on campaign start dates.
widgets.dataKey: SELECT date_trunc('month', "start_date")::VARCHAR AS "x", "campaign_name" AS "series", CAST(SUM("spend") AS DOUBLE) AS "value" FROM "t_marketing_campaigns" GROUP BY "x", "series" ORDER BY "x" ASC, "series" ASC
